examples: Because their salaries are low, they tend to overprescribe tests and drugs.
They also overprescribe medicines and get kickbacks from pharmaceutical and medical equipment companies.
With bundling Medicare hopes to remove incentives to overprescribe the expensive biologic drug.
Doctors who send patients to hospitals they own will be tempted to overprescribe.
Doctors have an incentive to see as many patients as quickly as possible, overprescribe drugs and keep patients in hospital.
